zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Hilles於1568年10月出生在英國素可洛瑟費爾德時，她的父親George Hilles34歲，母親Anne Agnes Dennyng30歲。她於1586年4月18日與William Russell在英國素可洛瑟費爾德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1595年11月在英國英格蘭易亞斯特 素可洛瑟費爾德享年27歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭易亞斯特 素可洛瑟費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Hilles于1568年10月出生在英国素可洛瑟費爾德时，她的父亲George Hilles34岁，母亲Anne Agnes Dennyng30岁。她于1586年4月18日与William Russell在英国素可洛瑟費爾德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1595年11月在英国英格兰易亞斯特 素可洛瑟費爾德享年27岁，埋葬在英国英格兰易亞斯特 素可洛瑟費爾德。

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Hilles was born in October 1568, in Rotherfield, Sussex, England, her father, George Hilles, was 34 and her mother, Anne Agnes Dennyng, was 30. She married William Russell on 18 April 1586, in Rotherfield, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died in November 1595, in Rotherfield, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 27, and was buried in Rotherfield, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Hilles est née en octobre 1568, à Rotherfield, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, George Hilles, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Anne Agnes Dennyng, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé William Russell le 18 avril 1586, à Rotherfield, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en novembre 1595, à Rotherfield, East Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Rotherfield, East Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Hilles im Oktober 1568 in Rotherfield, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George Hilles 34 und ihre Mutter Anne Agnes Dennyng 30. Sie hat am 18. April 1586 in Rotherfield, Sussex, England William Russell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb im November 1595 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Rotherfield, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Rotherfield, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Hilles è nata il nel ottobre 1568 nel Rotherfield, Sussex, England, sua padre, George Hilles, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Anne Agnes Dennyng, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato William Russell il 18 aprile 1586, nel Rotherfield, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel novembre 1595, nel Rotherfield, East Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolta a Rotherfield, East Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Hillesが1568年10月にイギリススセックスロスエルフィールドで生まれた時，父George Hillesは34歳，母Anne Agnes Dennyngは30歳であった。1586年4月18日にイギリススセックスロスエルフィールドでWilliam Russellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1595年11月にイギリスイギリスエアスト スセックスロスエルフィールドで27歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエアスト スセックスロスエルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Hilles(이)가 1568년 10월 영국 수세스 로더필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Hilles(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Agnes Dennyng(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1586년 4월 18일 영국 수세스 로더필드에서 William Russell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1595년 11월 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 로더필드에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 로더필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Hilles nasceu em outubro de 1568, em Rotherfield, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Hilles, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Anne Agnes Dennyng, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com William Russell em 18 de abril de 1586, em Rotherfield, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em novembro de 1595, em Rotherfield, East Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 27 anos, e foi sepultada em Rotherfield, East Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Hilles родилась октябрь 1568 г. в местности ротирфиелд, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени George Hilles было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Agnes Dennyng, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Russell 18 апреля 1586 г. в местности ротирфиелд, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла ноябрь 1595 г. в местности ротирфиелд, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности ротирфиелд, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con William Russell el 18 de abril de 1586, en Rotherfield, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en noviembre de 1595, en Rotherfield, East Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultada en Rotherfield, East Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
